# Media Mounter


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## MediaMounter Class

Handles mounting media directories as static file routes in the FastHTML
application. Each directory gets a unique URL prefix based on a hash of
its path.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/media/mounter.py#L18"
